description: Draft of a flowery letter in Hebrew with wide line spacing, possibly a communal epistle. The draft was abandoned in the first line of salutations. The scribal hand looks vaguely like that of Daniel b. ʿAzarya or some other mid-to-late-11th century communal leader. (Information from MR)
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
